title: coreopsis intermedia
intro: Coreopsis intermedia, also known as the large-flowered coreopsis, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The coreopsis intermedia plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and tinctures, have been used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
